# Docker images used by integration tests via testcontainers-go.
# The `integration` job in .github/workflows/test.yml caches these
# images as tar archives so CI doesn't re-pull ~900MB every run.
#
# Cache key in the workflow hashes this file's contents — bump or
# edit any line to force a fresh pull. Comments and blank lines are
# ignored by the loader script.
#
# Pin tags rather than `latest` where possible to keep CI deterministic.
# Update the corresponding tests when bumping versions here.

postgres:16-alpine
nats:2-alpine
redis:7-alpine
bitnamilegacy/postgresql:16
minio/minio:latest
